title: Thunder RTP
description: Thunder_RTP is a Minecraft plugin that adds structured random teleportation with group-based quarries and admin controls for seamless multiplayer exploration.
body:
## **Thunder_RTP - Advanced Random Teleportation Plugin for Minecraft**

**Thunder_RTP** is a feature-rich Minecraft plugin designed to enhance random teleportation by introducing quarries structured teleportation groups that players can join based on different game modes. With safety features, customizable settings, and admin controls, it ensures an engaging and seamless teleportation experience, perfect for exploration, survival, and adventure servers.

# **🌟 Features Overview**

** Quarry-Based Teleportation System**
Instead of traditional random teleportation, Thunder_RTP organizes players into quarries, which act as teleportation groups. Each quarry has a specific mode that determines the number of players it supports:

DUAL (2 players) – Perfect for paired exploration.
SQUAD (4 players) – Small teams can teleport together.
HEXA (6 players) – Mid-sized groups get a shared teleport experience.
OCTA (8 players) – Large teams can explore together.
Players can either create their own quarry or join an existing one, making it an ideal system for multiplayer collaboration.

# 🛡️ Safe & Configurable Teleportation
To ensure fair and safe teleportation, Thunder_RTP comes with built-in safety checks:

✔ **Avoids Dangerous Locations** – Players will not be teleported into water, lava, air, or hazardous blocks (magma, campfires, pointed dripstone, etc.).

✔ **Safe Landing System** –  If the teleport destination is too high, a temporary water block can be placed to prevent fall damage.

✔ **Configurable Teleport Range** – Server owners can set minimum and maximum teleport distances to control where players can be teleported.

✔ **Intelligent Randomization** – The plugin ensures teleportation happens in valid land locations by scanning for solid ground before placing players.


# ⚡ Dynamic Game & Quarry Management
The plugin provides an advanced GameManager that keeps track of active quarries, ensuring smooth player management:

🔹 **Auto-Remove Empty Quarries** – When the last player leaves a quarry, it is automatically removed to keep the system clean.

🔹 **Auto-Teleport Full Quarries** – Once a quarry reaches its player limit, all members are teleported together.

🔹 **Force Quarry Change** – Admins can move players between quarries or force them into different teleportation modes.

🔹 **Player Tracking** – The system ensures that players only belong to one quarry at a time.


# 🎮 Commands & Permissions

```
Player Commands:
Command	Description
/join <mode> [player]	Join or create a quarry.
/leavequarry	Leave your current quarry.
/quarries	List all active quarries.
Admin Commands:
Command	Description
/forcetp <player> <quarry_owner/id>	Force teleport a player to a quarry.
/forcechange <player> <quarry_type>	Change a player’s quarry type.
Permissions:
Permission	Function
thunderrtp.use	Allows players to use quarry teleportation.
thunderrtp.admin	Grants access to admin commands.
```

# 🛠️ Configuration & Customization

All key features are customizable via config.yml, including:

🔹**Teleportation Distance**: Set minimum and maximum range for random teleportation.

🔹**Quarry Settings**: Adjust player limits for different quarry types.

🔹**Safe Landing System**: Enable/disable temporary water placement for high fall risk locations.

🔹**Sounds & Messages**: Customize join/leave sounds, action bar notifications, and chat messages.

🔹**Force Teleport Limits**: Set limits on how many times a quarry can use force teleport before requiring a cooldown.


```
Example config.yml snippet:

teleport:
  min-range: 10000
  max-range: 20000
  safe-landing:
    enabled: true
    water-duration: 60
    dangerous-height: 3

messages:
  prefix: "§6[Thunder RTP] "
  quarry-full: "§cThis quarry is already full!"
  teleporting: "§aTeleporting..."
  no-permission: "§cYou do not have permission to use this command."

sounds:
  join:
    sound: ENTITY_PLAYER_LEVELUP
    volume: 1.0
    pitch: 1.0
  teleport:
    sound: ENTITY_ENDERMAN_TELEPORT
    volume: 1.0
    pitch: 1.0
```

# 📦 Installation & Setup

1️⃣ Download the Thunder_RTP plugin.

2️⃣ Place it inside the plugins folder of your Spigot/Paper server.

3️⃣ Restart the server to generate the default configuration files.

4️⃣ Modify config.yml to customize teleportation settings.

5️⃣ Use /join <mode> to start teleporting with quarries!


# 🔗 Compatibility & Requirements

✅ Minecraft Version: 1.19+

✅ Server Software: Spigot / Paper

✅ Dependencies: None


# 🌍 Why Use Thunder_RTP?

**Perfect for Survival & Exploration Servers** – Encourages fair teleportation while keeping multiplayer interactions balanced.

**More Control for Admins** – Allows staff to manage teleportation in a structured way.

**Enhances Gameplay** – Players can teleport in teams, making survival worlds more engaging.

**Fully Configurable** – Adjust all settings to fit your server’s needs.

### 📥 Download & Start Exploring!
### Take your server’s teleportation experience to the next level with Thunder_RTP! 🚀
